svg.text: miki Tier1 (Vulkan 1.4) — Frame Pipeline Timeline Semaphore Synchronization
2 Frames-in-Flight | 3 Queues (Graphics + Async Compute + Transfer) | Zero CPU/GPU Bubbles
framePacing: GPU N done → CPU N+1 start
Timeline Semaphore Signal — vkQueueSubmit2 with VkSemaphoreSubmitInfo (TIMELINE)
Timeline Semaphore Wait — vkWaitSemaphores (CPU) or vkQueueSubmit2 wait (GPU)
Binary Semaphore Signal — swapchain acquire (Vulkan spec VUID-03265 mandated)
Binary Semaphore Wait — vkQueuePresentKHR pWaitSemaphores (spec mandated)
Single framePacingSemaphore (timeline, monotonic frameNumber) replaces N VkFences
Binary semaphores ONLY for swapchain acquire/present (Vulkan spec hard constraint)
CPU records Frame N+1 while GPU executes Frame N — zero CPU idle bubble
Async Compute (GTAO, MatSort) overlaps with Graphics VisBuffer — zero GPU bubble
Transfer Queue streams clusters continuously — timeline sem sync at batch commit
vkWaitSemaphores userspace fast-path replaces vkWaitForFences kernel crossing
Graphics signals gfxSem after HiZ → Compute starts immediately (no full-frame wait)
Compute signals compSem → Graphics waits only at Deferred Resolve (late binding)
Frame pacing. Value = frameNumber. Replaces N VkFences. vkWaitSemaphores before acquire.
Swapchain acquire signal. Per frame-in-flight slot. Vulkan spec VUID-03265 mandated.
Present wait. Per swapchain image. VkPresentInfoKHR only accepts binary.
Transfer→Graphics DMA sync. Monotonic batch counter. Zero-stall streaming.
Graphics↔Async Compute overlap. Bidirectional: gfxSem + compSem values.
